product_overview: namaa_driver is a Flutter-based driver app backed by Supabase, providing secure driver authentication, profile management, trip history, wallet visibility, notifications, and support ticket handling. The app enables drivers to manage their operational account and review key service data through REST APIs.
core_goals: Allow drivers to sign in and sign out securely using email and password.
Enable drivers to view and maintain their profile and onboarding status.
Provide access to trip history and trip details for past work records.
Show wallet balance, transaction history, and support withdrawal requests.
Keep drivers informed with notifications and allow marking them as read.
Support driver help workflows through ticket creation, ticket listing, and ticket messaging.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Drivers can log in with email and password and securely end their session.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with access_token, token_type, and user object -> Use bearer token for authenticated driver operations
POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with invalid credentials -> Receive 400 with error and error_description -> Prompt user to retry login
POST /auth/v1/logout with valid bearer token -> Receive 204 no content -> Session is terminated on the client

features.name: Driver Profile
features.description: Drivers can fetch their profile, create or upsert their driver record, and update onboarding status.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /rest/v1/drivers?user_id=eq.{userId}&select=* with bearer token -> Receive 200 with driver profile data
POST /rest/v1/drivers with user_id, full_name, phone, status=pending, and locale=ar -> Receive 201 with created driver profile -> Driver record is available for onboarding and app usage
PATCH /rest/v1/drivers?id=eq.{driverId} with status=under_review -> Receive 200 with updated driver status -> Driver onboarding state is saved
GET /rest/v1/drivers?user_id=eq.{userId}&select=* with valid token but no matching user_id -> Receive 200 with empty list -> Show profile not found or prompt onboarding completion

features.name: Trip History
features.description: Drivers can browse paginated trip history and open trip details for a selected trip.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/trips?driver_id=eq.{driverId}&order=requested_at.desc&limit=20&offset=0 with bearer token -> Receive 200 with a paginated list of trips -> GET /rest/v1/trips?id=eq.{tripId}&select=* for one trip -> Receive 200 with trip details
GET /rest/v1/trips?driver_id=eq.{driverId}&order=requested_at.desc&limit=20&offset=20 with bearer token -> Receive 200 with the next page of trips -> Append results to the trip history list
GET /rest/v1/trips?driver_id=eq.{driverId}&order=requested_at.desc&limit=20&offset=0 without a valid token -> Receive 401/403 authorization failure -> Prevent access to trip records

features.name: Wallet
features.description: Drivers can view wallet balance, inspect transaction history, and submit withdrawal requests.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/driver_wallets?driver_id=eq.{driverId}&select=* with bearer token -> Receive 200 with wallet balance and totals -> GET /rest/v1/wallet_transactions?wallet_id=eq.{walletId}&order=created_at.desc&limit=30 -> Receive 200 with recent transactions

POST /rest/v1/withdrawal_requests with driver_id, wallet_id, amount, bank_name, account_number, and account_name -> Receive 201 with withdrawal request status -> Show request confirmation to the driver
GET /rest/v1/driver_wallets?driver_id=eq.{driverId}&select=* for a new driver without an auto-created wallet row -> Receive 200 with empty list -> Show wallet unavailable or no balance yet
POST /rest/v1/withdrawal_requests with invalid amount or incomplete bank details -> Receive 400 validation error -> Prompt the driver to correct the withdrawal form

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Drivers can retrieve recent notifications and mark individual notifications as read.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/notifications?recipient_id=eq.{driverId}&order=created_at.desc&limit=50 with bearer token -> Receive 200 with up to 50 notifications -> PATCH /rest/v1/notifications?id=eq.{notificationId} with is_read=true and read_at timestamp -> Receive 200/void and update notification state

GET /rest/v1/notifications?recipient_id=eq.{driverId}&order=created_at.desc&limit=50 with bearer token -> Receive 200 with unread notifications only if filtered client-side -> Display notification feed sorted by newest first
PATCH /rest/v1/notifications?id=eq.{notificationId} without valid token -> Receive 401/403 authorization failure -> Notification remains unread

features.name: Support Tickets
features.description: Drivers can create support tickets, view their tickets, and send messages within a ticket thread.
user_flows: POST /rest/v1/support_tickets with driver_id, category, and subject -> Receive 201 with ticket id, category, subject, and status -> POST /rest/v1/support_messages with ticket_id, sender_id, sender_type=driver, and message -> Receive 201 with message record

GET /rest/v1/support_tickets?driver_id=eq.{driverId}&order=created_at.desc with bearer token -> Receive 200 with the driver’s support ticket list -> Open a selected ticket thread by sending a message through POST /rest/v1/support_messages
POST /rest/v1/support_tickets with missing subject or category -> Receive 400 validation error -> Do not create the ticket

POST /rest/v1/support_tickets succeeds but POST /rest/v1/support_messages fails -> Ticket may exist without its first message due to non-atomic creation -> Driver is prompted to retry message submission

tech_stack.language: Python (test scripts call Supabase REST API directly)

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Email+Password login via Supabase Auth REST API

endpoints.description: Sign in driver with email and password

features.name: Driver Profile
features.description: Fetch and update driver profile from drivers table

response_schema.200: [{id, user_id, full_name, phone, email, status, rating, total_trips}]

features.name: Trip History
features.description: Paginated list of past trips for a driver

features.name: Wallet
features.description: Driver wallet balance and transaction history

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Fetch and mark notifications as read

features.name: Support Tickets
features.description: Create and list support tickets and messages

endpoints.description: Send a message in a ticket

known_limitations.issue: No wallet row auto-created for new drivers — requires DB trigger
known_limitations.impact: Wallet endpoint returns empty for new drivers

known_limitations.issue: Support ticket creation is not atomic
known_limitations.impact: Orphaned tickets possible if message insert fails
